description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image and a REPO_NAME variable set to gitlab.com/namespace/project. Add a global before_script that creates the GOPATH source directory for $REPO_NAME, symlinks the project directory into it, and changes into that directory. Define two stages: test and build. In the test stage add a format job that runs go fmt, go vet, and go test -race on all packages excluding vendor using the commands `go fmt $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/)`, `go vet $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/)`, and `go test -race $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/)`. In the build stage add a compile job that builds a statically linked binary with `go build -race -ldflags "-extldflags '-static'" -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/mybinary` and stores the resulting mybinary file as a job artifact.
